title: onosma propontica
intro: Onosma propontica, also known as Turkish golden root, is a perennial plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in Turkey. The plant contains iridoid glycosides, which have been studied for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Onosma propontica has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
